prompt: Research https://woocommerce.com/woocommerce-demo — it's a WooCommerce demo store. Map all available product APIs and cart endpoints. Run all 12 phases and document what you find.
expected_output: WooCommerce tech pack loaded, e-commerce probe list applied: /wp-json/wc/store/v1/products, /wp-json/wc/v3/products, wc-ajax endpoints probed.

assertions.text: At least one of /wp-json/wc/store/v1/products or /wp-json/wc/v3/products probed
api-surfaces/ directory contains at least one file

with_skill_result: PASS - WooCommerce 10.x loaded, Store API probed
old_skill_result: PASS - WooCommerce 9.x loaded, e-commerce probes applied
